column1: # Two-image partition table (4MB) — TankSync image + Matter image
# the SoftAP portal. BOTH images must be built against THIS exact table or the
# mode-swap bricks the boot. Each OTA slot is 0x1E0000 (~1.92 MB) — the Matter
# NOTE: moving an already-flashed unit from the old single-app table to this one
# requires a SERIAL reflash (OTA cannot rewrite the partition table). Fine today:
# no switches sold; only bench XIAOs exist.
